title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Microsoft India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Microsoft India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Patna office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
jsonLd.skills: CI/CD, AWS, JavaScript, Kubernetes, MongoDB, Go, Python, Agile/Scrum
